chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-3934 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For order on CMA No.1347/2026 (Urgency) 2. For order on office objection Nos.1 to 6 3. For order on CMA No.16126/2025 (Exemption) 4. For order on CMA No.16127/2025 (Stay) 5. For hearing of main case 23.1.2026 Mr. Muhammad Tarique advocate for the petitioner --------------------- This is a petition against illegal construction. Learned counsel for the petitioner at first instance shall move his complaint to the Sindh Building Control Authority (SBCA) through the Smart Complaint Redressal Mechanism (SCRM) and the SBCA shall decide the same in accordance with its own SOPs in the event that such complaint is filed. A copy of this order shall be sent to the Director General SBCA, for information. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE Zahid/*
